class.name: ASEffectState
class.brief_description: Represents the current state of an active effect.
class.description:
ASEffectState stores all necessary information about an active effect for serialization, state management, and rollback purposes.
Used by ASStateCache and ASComponentState to save and restore effect states. Contains timing information, stack data, and effect level for complete state reconstruction.

method.name: is_expired
method.description: Returns true if the effect's remaining time has expired (≤ 0.0).

method.name: is_period_ready
method.description: Returns true if the effect's period timer is ready (≤ 0.0).

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the effect state to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads effect state data from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The effect tag identifying this effect type.
Remaining duration before the effect expires.
Time remaining until the next periodic trigger.
Current stack count for stackable effects.
Effect level/multiplier for scaling effect potency.
